description: EPRA-licensed electrical contractor based in Ruiru. Has a Facebook presence. Small-scale local electrical contracting firm.
Thika-based firm dealing in interior design, electrical, plumbing, tiling and related services. Website under development. Active on Facebook and Instagram.
EPRA-licensed electrical contractor based in Kisumu. No web presence found. Likely a small local contracting firm.
EPRA-licensed electrical contractor in Nyeri. Note: Wardah Electrics Ltd (wardahelectrics.com) is a different Nairobi-based entity. No direct web presence found for this Nyeri-based firm.
EPRA-licensed electrical contractor based in Thika. No web presence found.

Leading provider of sustainable energy solutions and cutting-edge technology services in Kenya. Specializes in testing and commissioning, electrical studies, arc flash analysis, solar, relay protection. ISO certified.
EPRA-licensed electrical contractor in Nairobi. No dedicated web presence found for the Kenyan entity. AMAC Technologies brand exists globally but not connected to this Kenyan EPRA licensee.
EPRA Class B licensed electrical contractor based in Thika. Construction and electrical contracting. No web presence found.

Service-based security system integrator specialized in physical, cyber and network security. Provides biometric access control, digital ID solutions. Located at Spasys Gardens, Milimani Rd, Starehe, Nairobi. Also listed on D&B, KenyaBizList, Crunchbase.

Established construction and engineering company in Nairobi. Located at Garden Estate Road Off Marurui Road / Evergreen Centre, Kiambu Rd. Also has plot along Ruiru-Kiambu Road. Listed on Devex as international development contractor.
Engineering firm led by Eng. Gilbert Sang. Involved in engineering, procurement and construction of turnkey projects including solar installations. No dedicated website found.
EPRA Class A-1 licensed electrical contractor based in Mombasa. Note: company name has typo 'Enginering'. No web presence found.
EPRA Class A-1 licensed electrical contractor in Nairobi. Listed in active contractor register. No dedicated website found but email domain exists.

Electrical sales, supplies and services company in Nairobi. Specializes in modular building installations, electrical maintenance and installations. Established 2013. 51-100 employees. Based at Kayole Junction. Listed on BusinessList, ensun, Afro Muziki.
Kenyan energy services and products company with three main product lines. Key player in the energy market. EPRA Class A-1 licensed. Recruits electrical engineers. Active website.
EPRA Class C-2 licensed electrical contractor based in Mutomo (Kitui County). No web presence found. Likely a small local contracting firm.

International Energy Technik (IET) - ISO 9001:2015 certified electrical engineering company. Provides HV substations, industrial automation & drives, building management systems, LV switchboards, control panels. Over 75 years of experience in East Africa. Official Phoenix Contact distribution partner in Kenya.
EPRA-licensed electrical installation contractor in Webuye (Bungoma County). ISIC code 4321 (electrical installation). Listed on Cybo and AfricaBizInfo. No website.

Kenyan arm of global Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy - world's leading solar EPC solutions provider. Portfolio of 258 solar power projects with 11.6 GWp aggregate capacity across 24 countries. Also does MEP and EPC for power, data centers, DG sets, cogeneration. Nairobi office at Delta Corner Tower 2, Chiromo Road.

Electrical and electronics recycling and systems company in Nairobi. Note: name has typo 'Reyclers'. Involved in generator servicing and electrical systems. Listed on D&B, KenyaBizList, Volza trade data. Technical Manager is Irene Karimi Mbogo (LinkedIn).
